reviews.review_title: mixed reality battle bots is fun!
reviews.review_description: nice early access game. the bots are not easily duped. i hope this game gets enough attention so there can be further development and a multiplayer mode. the steering is certainly a challenge for it's own, i guess it's like controlling a tank, but i still haven't completely figured out its mechanism. the discord invite link is expired by the way😅

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your support! Exactly the kind of feedback we want - really helpful 🙌
Multiplayer is certainly a top priority, as well as customizable controls (and robots!). It's a small team so it's great to know where to focus. Also, good catch with the discord link! Should be working now.

reviews.review_description: Bare bones as of now but surprisingly fun has a lot of potential
